---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or parameter
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What feature or parameter would you like to see?

## Use Case
Why is this useful? (e.g., track day monitoring, tune validation, daily driving)

## Technical Details
If this is a new PID/parameter:
- **ECU**: (PCM / BCM / IPC / other)
- **Mode**: (1 / 22 / other)
- **PID**: (hex value, if known)
- **Formula**: (if known)
- **Source**: (FORScan dump, DigiCluster, OBD4RS, etc.)

## Alternatives
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered.
